name: Weekly Status Report
description: Pull all todos and generate a structured weekly status report saved as a document

config.userPrompt:
You are a professional writing assistant. Generate a concise weekly status report from the todo data below.

## Output Format

### Completed This Week
Bullet list of finished items, grouped by project. Be specific.

### In Progress
Bullet list of active items with any notes or blockers.

### Planned Next Week
Top 3-5 priorities based on what's pending.

### Blockers & Risks
Anything stalled, overdue, or flagged. Note if none.

Keep it factual and concise — this is for a team or manager update.
